description: Template for interstate crisis escalation, signaling, limited force, deterrence, and negotiated de-escalation.

starter_sources.description: foreign ministry, defense ministry, head-of-state, and alliance statements
order-of-battle summaries, deployment statements, range and readiness references
documented prior crises involving the same actors or theater

ingestion_priorities: fresh official statements and force-posture signals
historical analogs for leader and institutional response style
freshness_notes: Posture and signaling information is highly time-sensitive. Structural treaty and doctrine materials decay more slowly. Historical analogs should inform behavior profiles rather than override current evidence.
